result.stdout:
Description:
  A dotnet tool for generating TypeScript code from .NET POCO types.

Usage:
  nablats [options]

Options:
  -p, --project <project>                           Path to the .csproj file. If omitted, will search one in current directory.
  -f, --configuration <name>                        Project configuration to resolve output assembly. [default: Debug]
  -a, --assembly <file_path>                        Path to the .NET assembly to discover source types. If set, will override the --project option.
  -o, --output <dir_path>                           Path to the directory where to store generated TypeScript files.
  -s, --strategy <Annotation|Auto|WebApi>           The way to discovery POCO types [default: Auto]
  -r, --arrange <Explicit|Namespace|Nature|Single>  How the generated TypeScript modules should be arranged. [default: Explicit]
  -m, --file-name <name>                            Default file name for Explicit or Single arrangement.
  -n, --namespace                                   Generate TypeScript code with namespaces.
  -S, --discoverer <type_name>                      Full CLR name of type to use for discovering POCO types.
  -c, --camel-case                                  Use camel-case for type members.
  -d, --date <Date|Number|String>                   How date types be mapped. [default: String]
  -e, --enum <Const|Number|Object|Union>            How enum types be mapped. [default: Number]
  -u, --no-nullable                                 Disable nullables
  --mapping <mapping>                               Path to the type mapping file
  -P, --compact                                     Compact output file by eliminating blank lines.
  -D, --double-quote                                Use double-quote for string literals.
  -I, --indent-size <num_of_space>                  Indent size, will ignored when using tab indent. [default: 4]
  -T, --tab-indent                                  Use \t instead of spaces.
  -C, --semicolon                                   Add semicolons if necessary.
  --header <file_path>                              Path to a file which you want its content been embeded into top of each output file.
  --footer <file_path>                              Path to a file which you want its content been embeded into bottom of each output file.
  -w, --watch                                       Watches target assembly and update output when changed automatically.
  --dry-run                                         Print generated code on console, do not write any file.
  --silent                                          Do not output any information except generated code with --dry-run option set.
  --version                                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                    Show help and usage information
